Part.Source: Event Start txtLiberada1.ForeColor = rgb(76, 153, 218) txtLiberada2.ForeColor = RGB(100,140,170) txtLiberada3.ForeColor = RGB(100,140,170) txtFornecedorAlerta.Visible = 0 txtProdutosAlerta.Visible = 0 do 'loadCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UnnamedTable15.Width = 100 &CotComSts.Visible = False Grid1.Rows = 0 &ActionGroup2Data = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos da Cotação' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarProdutosCotacao' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Menor preço dos fornecedores' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Observações dos fornecedores' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'USerObservacoes' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos Empatados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarEmpatados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = '----------------------------------------' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'UserAction3es' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos confirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarConfirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos NÃO confirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarNaoConfirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CotComForSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid1.Load For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComForCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CotComCod = &CotComCod &CotComForSts = CotComForSts &CotComForCod = CotComForCod RetornaNomePessoa.Call(EmpCod, CotComForCod, &CotComForRaz) &CotComForNum = CotComForNum &CotComForEmail = CotComForEmail /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UserUpdateFornecedor = !'' If (CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.BLOQUEADO) &UserUpdateFornecedor.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserUpdateFornecedor.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &UserRemoveFornecedor = !'' If (CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.BLOQUEADO) &UserRemoveFornecedor.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserRemoveFornecedor.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &GridActionGroup1.Clear() &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(0, 'O que Fazer?') If (CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.LIBERADO and CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Liberada) &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(1, 'Suspender Cotação') Endif If (CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.BLOQUEADO and CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Liberada) &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(2, 'Liberar Cotação') Endif If (CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.LIBERADO and CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Liberada) &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(3, 'Reenviar Link Cotação') Endif If (CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.FINALIZADA and CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Liberada) &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(4, 'Reiniciar Cotação') Endif If &GridActionGroup1.Count = 1 &GridActionGroup1.Class = !'Invisible' Else &GridActionGroup1.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf Do Case Case &CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.BLOQUEADO &CotComForSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case &CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.FINALIZADA &CotComForSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case &CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.LIBERADO &CotComForSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise &CotComForSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Load EndFor EndEvent Event 'DoUserAction1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserAction1_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction1_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = addProdutoCotacaoIndividual.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserAction2' wpCotacaoCompraGrupoProdutos.Link(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserAction3' wpCotacaoCompraProdutos.Link(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ActionGroup2.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarProdutosCotacao' Do 'Do VisualizarProdutosCotacao' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' Do 'Do Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'USerObservacoes' Do 'Do USerObservacoes' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarEmpatados' Do 'Do VisualizarEmpatados' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'UserAction3es' Do 'Do UserAction3es' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarConfirmados' Do 'Do VisualizarConfirmados' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarNaoConfirmados' Do 'Do VisualizarNaoConfirmados' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarProdutosCotacao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosEmpatadosNaoConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'L') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcMenorPrecofornecedor.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event USerObservacoes_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcObservacoesFornecedores.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarEmpatados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosEmpatadosNaoConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'E') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarConfirmados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarNaoConfirmados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosEmpatadosNaoConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'N') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserAddFornecedor' if &CountFornecedores < 10 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserAddFornecedor_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndEvent Event UserAddFornecedor_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAddFornecedor.Create('INS', &EmPCod, &CotComCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserUpdateFornecedor.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserUpdateFornecedor_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdateFornecedor_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAddFornecedor.Create('UPD', &EmPCod, &CotComCod, &CotComForCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserRemoveFornecedor.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserRemoveFornecedor_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserRemoveFornecedor_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAddFornecedor.Create('DEL', &EmPCod, &CotComCod, &CotComForCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &GridActionGroup1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &GridActionGroup1 = 1 Do 'Do UserAction4' Case &GridActionGroup1 = 2 Do 'Do UserAction5' Case &GridActionGroup1 = 3 Do 'Do UserAction6' Case &GridActionGroup1 = 4 Do 'Do UserAction7' EndCase &GridActionGroup1 = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction4_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcLiberarFornecedor.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, &CotComForCod, 'S') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction4_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction5_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcLiberarFornecedor.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, &CotComForCod, 'L') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction5_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction6_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcLiberarFornecedor.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, &CotComForCod, 'R') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction6_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction7_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcLiberarFornecedor.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, &CotComForCod, 'N') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction7_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserInsert_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserInsert_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAddCotacao.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserSair' wwCotacaoCompras.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DouserLiberarCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ userLiberarCotacao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event userLiberarCotacao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcConfirmarCotacao.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoReceberCotacoes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ReceberCotacoes_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ReceberCotacoes_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcReceberCotacao.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, '') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCancelarCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ CancelarCotacao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event CancelarCotacao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcBloquearCancelarCotacao.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'C') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoFinalziarCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ FinalziarCotacao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event FinalziarCotacao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcReceberCotacao.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'F') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoEncerrarCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ EncerrarCotacao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EncerrarCotacao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcBloquearCancelarCotacao.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'E') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do VisualizarProdutosCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarProdutosCotacao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do USerObservacoes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ USerObservacoes_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarEmpatados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarEmpatados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction3es' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarConfirmados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarConfirmados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarNaoConfirmados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarNaoConfirmados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserAction4_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction5' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserAction5_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction6' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserAction6_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction7' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserAction7_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event EncerrarCotacao_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) EndEvent Event FinalziarCotacao_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) EndEvent Event CancelarCotacao_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) EndEvent Event ReceberCotacoes_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) EndEvent Event userLiberarCotacao_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod,&CotComCod) EndEvent Event UserRemoveFornecedor_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod,&CotComCod) EndEvent Event UserAction1_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) EndEvent Event UserInsert_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod,&CotComCod) EndEvent Event UserAddFornecedor_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod,&CotComCod) EndEvent Event UserUpdateFornecedor_Modal.Close wpDadosCotacao.Link(&EmpCod,&CotComCod) EndEvent Sub 'loadCotacao' tbAcoesIMprimri.Visible = false &CountProdutos = 0 &CountFornecedores = 0 btnReceberCotacoes.Visible = false For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CotComCod = &CotComCod btnFinalziarCotacao.Visible = false btnEncerrarCotacao.Visible = false tbAcoesIMprimri.Visible = false &CotComSts = CotComSts txtLiberada2.Caption = 'Não permitido sua edição até o término da cotação estipulada em: ' + trim(toformattedString(CotComDtaLim)) + ' ou com a finalização do preenchimento de preços do fornecedor.' Do CAse CAse CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Liberada btnFinalziarCotacao.Visible = true tbLiberada.Visible = true btnCancelarCotacao.Caption = 'Interromper Cotação' btnReceberCotacoes.Visible = true btnUserAction1.Visible = 0 btnUserAction2.Visible = 0 btnUserAction3.Visible = 1 tbAcoesIMprimri.Visible = true Case CotComSts = StatusCOtacao.Finalizada btnEncerrarCotacao.Visible = true btnFinalziarCotacao.Visible = false btnCancelarCotacao.Visible = false btnReceberCotacoes.Visible = false tbLiberada.Visible = true txtLiberada1.Caption = 'COTAÇÃO FINALIZADA' txtLiberada1.ForeColor = rgb(2, 178, 74) txtLiberada2.Visible = false txtLiberada3.visible = false btnUserAction1.Visible = 0 btnUserAction2.Visible = 0 btnUserAction3.Visible = 1 tbAcoesIMprimri.Visible = true CAse CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Encerrada btnEncerrarCotacao.Visible = true btnCancelarCotacao.Visible = false btnEncerrarCotacao.Caption = 'Abrir Cotação' btnFinalziarCotacao.Visible = false txtLiberada1.Caption = 'COTAÇÃO ENCERRADA' txtLiberada1.ForeColor = rgb(0, 0, 0) txtLiberada2.Visible = false txtLiberada3.Visible = false tbLiberada.Visible = true btnUserAction1.Visible = 0 btnUserAction2.Visible = 0 btnUserAction3.Visible = 1 tbAcoesIMprimri.Visible = true Case CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Cancelada btnUserAction3.Visible = 0 tbLiberada.Visible = true btnCancelarCotacao.Visible = 0 txtLiberada1.Caption = 'COTAÇÃO CANCELADA' txtLiberada2.Visible = 0 txtLiberada3.Visible = 0 btnUserAddFornecedor.Visible = 0 btnUserAction1.Visible = 0 btnUserAction2.Visible = 0 tbAcoesIMprimri.Visible = 1 Otherwise //tbAcoesIMprimri.Visible = true btnUserAction3.Visible = 0 tbLiberada.Visible = false btnCancelarCotacao.Caption = 'Cancelar Cotação' EndCAse if CotComSts <> StatusCotacao.Pendente and CotComSts <> StatusCotacao.Bloqueada //Ja liberada btnuserLiberarCotacao.Visible = false btnUserInsert.Visible = false Endif btnUserAddFornecedor.Visible = (CotComSts <> StatusCotacao.Finalizada and CotComSts <> StatusCotacao.Encerrada) &CotComDtaEms = CotComDtaEms &CotComDtaHorLib = CotComDtaHorLib &CotComFunCod = CotComFunCod &CotComObs = CotComObs &CotComDtaLim = CotComDtaLim &CotComLctCod = CotComLctCod do 'loadTipoLancamento' &CotComFilCod = CotComFilCod &CotComNom = CotComNom For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComItmCod &CountProdutos += 1 If CotComProMenForCod > 0 and not CotComProMenForCod.IsEmpty() and not CotComProMenForCod.IsNull() &CountMenorPreco += 1 Endif If CotComProMenForCod = -999 &CountEmpatados += 1 Endif If CotComProSelForCod > 0 and not CotComProSelForCod.IsEmpty() and not CotComProSelForCod.IsNull() &CountConfirmados += 1 Endif &IsTemPreco = false For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComItmCod, CotComProForCod where CotComProForSts = StatusProdutoCotado.COTADO &IsTemPreco = true Exit EndFor if &IsTemPreco = false &CountSemPreco += 1 Endif EndFor For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComForCod &CountFornecedores += 1 EndFor Exit when None wwcotacaocompras.Link() EndFor if &CountSemPreco > 0 txtProdutosSemPreco.Caption = format('(%1) Produtos Sem Preço.', trim(toformattedString(&CountSemPreco))) Else txtProdutosSemPreco.Visible = 0 Endif if &CountMenorPreco > 0 txtProdutosMenorFornecedor.Caption = format('(%1) Produtos com Menor preço informado.', trim(toformattedString(&CountMenorPreco))) Else txtProdutosMenorFornecedor.Visible = 0 Endif if &CountEmpatados > 0 txtProdutosEmpatados.Caption = format('(%1) Produtos Empatados.', trim(toformattedString(&CountEmpatados))) Else txtProdutosEmpatados.Visible = 0 Endif if &CountConfirmados > 0 txtProdutosConfirmados.Caption = format('(%1) Produtos Confirmados.', trim(toformattedString(&CountConfirmados))) Else txtProdutosConfirmados.Visible = 0 Endif Do CAse CAse &CountProdutos = 0 txtProdutosquantidade.Caption = 'Nenhum produto adicionado!' CAse &CountProdutos = 1 txtProdutosquantidade.Caption = '(1) Produto adicionado.' Otherwise txtProdutosquantidade.Caption = format('(%1) Produtos adicionados.', trim(toformattedString(&CountProdutos))) if &CountProdutos >50 txtProdutosAlerta.Visible = 1 Endif EndCAse Do CAse CAse &CountFornecedores = 0 txtTotalFornecedores.Caption = 'Nenhum fornecedor adicionado!' CAse &CountFornecedores = 1 txtTotalFornecedores.Caption = '(1) Fornecedor adicionado.' Case &CountFornecedores = 10 txtTotalFornecedores.Caption = 'Quantidade máxima de 10 fornecedores alcançada!' txtFornecedorAlerta.Visible = 1 btnUserAddFornecedor.Visible = false Otherwise txtTotalFornecedores.Caption = format('(%1) Fornecedores adicionados.', trim(toformattedString(&CountFornecedores))) if &CountFornecedores > 5 txtFornecedorAlerta.Visible = 1 endif EndCAse EndSub Sub 'loadTipoLancamento' For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where LctCod = &CotComLctCod &CotComLctNom = LctNom Exit EndFor EndSub
